title: Wet-dry methodologies for studying cell-surface and cell-cell interactions
author: Suarez Diez, Maria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: SURFBIO project webinars within WP2 (2021). Content: The state-of-the-art approaches, technologies and tools dedicated to microbial genome isolation, sequencing, and data analysis: Part I: Technologies and computational workflows for analysis of genome data (María Suárez Díez, WUR). Part II: Experimental techniques for microbial genome isolation (Juan Antonio Tamayo Ramos, UBU). Webinar on transcriptomics analysis: from experimental design to data analysis: Methodologies for isolation and purification of high-quality RNA from biotic and abiotic surfaces (Juan Antonio Tamayo Ramos, UBU). Technologies and computational workflows for analysis of RNA data (Maria Suarez Diez, WUR). Detailing state of the art approaches, from sample preparation to data analysis, dedicated to proteomics in the context of cell-cell and cell-surface interactions (Cristina Furlan, UBU). Detailing state of the art approaches, technologies and tools dedicated to metabolomics approaches, by Juan José González Plaza (UBU). Computational methods for omics data analysis and integration: Statistical and computational workflows for omics data integration, by María Suárez-Díez (WUR). Webinar on Introduction to FAIR data management in SURFBIO, by María Suárez-Díez (WUR).
